channel.title: Malformed Dates Test Feed
channel.description: Feed testing various date format edge cases

item.title: Article With ISO 8601 Date
item.description: This article uses an ISO 8601 formatted date instead of RFC 822. The ingest pipeline should parse this gracefully.

item.title: Article With Proper RFC 822 Date
item.description: This article uses a properly formatted RFC 822 date, which is the standard for RSS 2.0 feeds. Should parse without issues.

item.title: Article With Empty pubDate
item.description: This article has an empty pubDate element. The ingest pipeline should fall back to the current time or handle gracefully without crashing.

item.title: Article With Null String pubDate
item.description: This article has the literal string "null" as its pubDate value. Edge case testing for type coercion issues in date parsing.

item.title: Article With Far Future Date (2030)
item.description: This article is dated in the far future — January 2030. The pipeline should handle this without error, though it may be filtered if maxAgeDays logic also enforces a future-date ceiling.
